title: Split "Automation" updates from updates we type into the conversation bubble
excerpt: Hi Monday.com Community! Here is a thought, I think it would be great if “automations” were separate from updates we type in, see photo attached. I see that we can use the “Info Box” section for notes but coming from a f…

posts.author: bpardo (Brenda Pardo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday.com Community! Here is a thought, I think it would be great if “automations” were separate from updates we type in, see photo attached. I see that we can use the “Info Box” section for notes but coming from a fast pace work environment, the updates sections is the quickest and easiest place to update each other about our listings. Would this be possible? Maybe adding a Tab on the top section for just automation updates. We have a lot of automations going out to our team, so sometimes our important updates get lost in the “ougoing Email - Automations” updates.

326909134_1548607735622226_6417237047714760907_n1109×841 45.1 KB

posts.author: portfolioadmin (PortfolioAdmin)
posts.cookedHtml: This post is from February 2023, and we are almost in 2026. Brenda came up with a great idea, and yet there are no replies from Monday.com on this. The community has been voicing it’s frustration about these “Updates”. Please respond.
